Keywords: card stack, vertical scroll, simple, full-width cards, single column
Description: Vertical scroll of full-width dashboard cards stacked in a single column
Structure: ScrollView > YStack of full-width Card components with consistent gap
Best For: Simple metric dashboards; health trackers; personal finance; weather
Scroll Behavior: Vertical scroll (ScrollView or FlatList); pull-to-refresh at top
Tamagui Pattern: ScrollView > YStack gap="$4" padding="$3" > Card components (YStack + content)
Paper Pattern: ScrollView > View style gap > Card (mode="elevated") components
Example Apps: Apple Health; Robinhood home; Simple finance apps

Description: Two-column flex grid of equal-width widget cards for dense metric overview
Best For: Multi-metric overview; IoT monitoring; weather station; fitness rings
Scroll Behavior: Vertical scroll; cards wrap to fill 2 columns; pull-to-refresh
Paper Pattern: ScrollView > View flexWrap="wrap" flexDirection="row" > Surface cards (width 48%)
Example Apps: Home Assistant; IoT dashboards; Apple Watch grid; FitBit

Keywords: tab, segmented, multi-section, overview, positions, history, tabs
Description: Top tabs or segmented control with card stack per tab for multi-section dashboards
Structure: Tabs/SegmentedButtons > conditional render of card stack per active tab
Scroll Behavior: Each tab has its own vertical scroll; preserve scroll position per tab
Tamagui Pattern: Tabs + Tabs.List + Tabs.Trigger per section + Tabs.Content (lazy-render with React.memo)
Paper Pattern: SegmentedButtons (value onValueChange buttons) + conditional View per segment
GlueStack Pattern: use expo-router top-tabs or custom Tabs
Example Apps: Binance; Coinbase; Robinhood positions; Admin panels

Keywords: hero, primary metric, highlight, portfolio, revenue, top stat
Description: Large primary metric prominently at top with FlatList of secondary cards below
Structure: YStack: Hero area (large text + subtitle) > FlatList of Cards
Best For: Portfolio-first apps; e-commerce revenue; SaaS MRR; single-KPI focus
Scroll Behavior: Vertical scroll; hero may be sticky or scroll away; FlatList for cards
Tamagui Pattern: YStack > Hero (H1 SizableText + SizableText subtitle) > FlatList of Card items
Paper Pattern: View > Surface (elevation 3) hero section > FlatList of Card items
GlueStack Pattern: VStack > Box (hero) > FlatList of Card items
Example Apps: Robinhood portfolio; Shopify revenue; Stripe dashboard

Keywords: swipeable, horizontal, pager, panels, pages, carousel
Description: Horizontal swipe between full-screen dashboard panels (portfolio/watchlist/alerts)
Structure: PagerView or ScrollView (horizontal pagingEnabled) with page indicators
Scroll Behavior: Horizontal paging (one panel per screen width); each panel scrolls vertically independently
Tamagui Pattern: ScrollView (horizontal pagingEnabled showsHorizontalScrollIndicator={false}) + page width Views
Example Apps: Robinhood (swipe between watchlists); Trading apps; Banking apps

Keywords: sticky, header, fixed, summary bar, animated header, collapse
Description: Animated sticky summary bar that stays visible while body content scrolls
Structure: Animated.View (sticky header) + ScrollView (body widgets); header may collapse on scroll
Best For: Data-dense financial dashboards; admin dashboards; analytics with key metrics always visible
Scroll Behavior: Vertical scroll for body; sticky header fixed at top; Reanimated for collapse animation
Tamagui Pattern: Reanimated Animated YStack (position absolute top onScroll interpolation) + ScrollView body
Paper Pattern: Appbar.Header (statusBarHeight safe-area) fixed + ScrollView with contentContainerStyle paddingTop
Example Apps: Bloomberg; TradingView mobile; Yahoo Finance; Banking apps

Keywords: collapsible, accordion, grouped, sections, expandable categories
Description: Accordion of expandable sections grouping related metrics and actions
Best For: Settings-like grouped data; CRM contact detail; admin category management; grouped stats
Scroll Behavior: Vertical scroll; sections expand/collapse independently; animated height transition
Tamagui Pattern: ScrollView > YStack of custom Accordion (Pressable header + animated YStack content)
Paper Pattern: ScrollView > List.Section > List.Accordion (title left expanded onPress) per group
Example Apps: Settings apps; CRM detail; Grouped admin panels

Keywords: bottom sheet, map, chart primary, persistent sheet, peek
Description: Full-screen chart or map as background with persistent bottom sheet for data
Structure: ZStack: full-screen content (chart/map) + persistent bottom sheet (peek + full expand)
Best For: Chart-primary dashboards; map-based dashboards; location tracking; delivery monitoring
Scroll Behavior: Sheet: vertical scroll within; Main content: static or pan/zoom; peek = 30% / full = 80%
Example Apps: Google Maps; Uber; Apple Maps transit; TradingView chart focus

Keywords: drawer, sidebar, hamburger, navigation, admin, large screen
Description: Persistent sidebar drawer (tablet) or hamburger drawer (phone) with main content area
Structure: Drawer navigation: sidebar (tablet min 240px) or swipe-from-left (phone) + main content area
Best For: Admin dashboards; large-screen CRM; enterprise apps; multi-section admin
Scroll Behavior: Main content: vertical scroll; drawer: fixed sidebar on tablet / overlay on phone
Tamagui Pattern: use expo-router Drawer layout with drawerType responsive
Paper Pattern: Drawer.Section + Drawer.Item (label icon active onPress) with main content View
Example Apps: Admin panels; Firebase console; Google Analytics mobile; Enterprise CRM

Keywords: floating, overlay, gradient, premium, glass, onboarding
Description: Cards floating over a gradient or image background for premium visual effect
Structure: ZStack: gradient/image background + YStack of Cards with elevation/shadow
Best For: Premium marketing dashboards; onboarding stat screens; fintech welcome; gaming profiles
Scroll Behavior: Vertical scroll for cards; background is static or parallax
Tamagui Pattern: ZStack > LinearGradient (full screen) + ScrollView > YStack of Cards (elevate borderRadius="$4")
Paper Pattern: ImageBackground or LinearGradient > ScrollView > Card (mode="elevated") components
Example Apps: Banking welcome; Gaming profile; Premium subscription stats; Fitness achievement
